DebugTimings.Name: Debug Region Paint Timings
DebugTimings.Hint: Log timing details for region paint mask rebuilds, previews, and commits.

ShowPaintHelp.Name: Show Region Paint Help
ShowPaintHelp.Hint: Show the short mouse/keyboard help text in the Region Paint dialog.

PaintGridStepDebounce.Name: Paint Grid Step Debounce
PaintGridStepDebounce.Hint: Delay in milliseconds before rebuilding mask resolution after changing Grid Step.

PaintRangeDebounce.Name: Paint Slider Debounce
PaintRangeDebounce.Hint: Delay in milliseconds before recalculating region boundaries while dragging paint dialog sliders.

PaintInputDebounce.Name: Paint Input Debounce
PaintInputDebounce.Hint: Delay in milliseconds before recalculating region boundaries after number, checkbox, or selector changes.

PaintTinyIslandArea.Name: Paint Tiny Island Area
PaintTinyIslandArea.Hint: Maximum island area, in image pixels, removed by the Remove Tiny Islands button.

PaintTinyHoleArea.Name: Paint Tiny Hole Area
PaintTinyHoleArea.Hint: Maximum hole area, in image pixels, filled by the Remove Tiny Holes button.

Help.Title: Help
Help.CtrlClick: Ctrl-click HSL-fills from the clicked colour.
Help.CtrlShiftClick: Ctrl-Shift-click HSL-erases from the clicked colour.
Help.AltClick: Alt-click fills the clicked source region shape.
Help.ShiftAltClick: Shift-Alt-click erases the clicked source region shape.

Hint.BrushSize: Brush diameter in pixels. Ctrl-wheel also changes this.
Hint.FillTolerance: Lower is stricter, higher fills more similar colours.
Hint.ProgressiveFill: Compare fill tolerance to the previous filled cell instead of only the clicked colour.
Hint.FillBridge: 0 is strict; higher values cross small gaps.
Hint.FillHoles: Fill internal holes when calculating the final Region boundary.
Hint.GridStep: 1 is most precise; higher values are faster but coarser.
Hint.ShrinkGrow: Negative shrinks, positive grows the final boundary.
Hint.BorderSmooth: 0 keeps detail; higher values simplify jagged edges.
Hint.BorderSmoothType: Choose how the traced boundary is smoothed after mask processing.
Hint.BorderThickness: 0 hides live borders; thicker values make them easier to see.

Status.Paint: Paint on the canvas to add to the region. Shift-left mouse subtracts.

Notifications.PaintRegion: Indy Regions | Paint a Region. Left mouse adds, Shift-left subtracts.
